NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-15-2005 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 501. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR APR-04-2005 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON OCT-12-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANTS' FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANTS EDUCATIONAL VISIONS, INC. AND DAVID LUTHER ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANTS EDUCATIONAL VISIONS, INC. AND DAVID LUTHER IN THE AMOUNT OF $736.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
